title: Vietnamese-Style Stuffed Pilchards
description: A vegan twist on traditional Vietnamese stuffed fish, using pilchards and intensely flavorful spices.

ingredients.name: intensely pungent
ingredients.notes: fish sauce alternative (such as nama shoyu)

instructions: Rinse and pat dry the pilchards.
In a blender or food processor, combine intensely pungent, vietnamese, ca, kho, to, and 1/4 cup of coconut milk.
Stuff each pilchard with the spicy mixture.
Place the pilchards in a baking dish and pour the remaining coconut milk over them.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the pilchards are cooked through.
Garnish with chopped basil before serving.
